title: erodium keithii
intro: Erodium keithii, also known as Keith's storksbill or wild mignonette, is a perennial flowering plant species in the geranium family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. It is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Erodium keithii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
